name: Fleet Day 0 Technician Onboarding
description: Critical Day 0 onboarding tasks for fleet technicians

steps.title: Immediate System Setup
steps.description: Setup critical systems and access on Day 0

substeps.title: Create Enterprise ID credentials
substeps.description: Generate Enterprise ID and initial password for technician

substeps.title: Activate mobile device access
substeps.description: Provision mobile device with fleet management apps

substeps.title: Setup emergency contact system
substeps.description: Configure emergency contact information and protocols

steps.title: Critical Safety Protocol Setup
steps.description: Establish essential safety and security measures

substeps.title: Complete critical safety briefing
substeps.description: Deliver and confirm understanding of essential safety protocols

substeps.title: Emergency procedure training
substeps.description: Train on emergency response procedures and contacts

substeps.title: Notify fleet management team
substeps.description: Alert fleet supervisors of new technician start date

substeps.title: Setup communication channels
substeps.description: Configure radio, phone, and messaging systems
